title: Cobblemon Create Compat
description: A datapack focused on integrating Cobblemon into the progression of Create, including rebalanced Poké Balls, craftable Exp Candies, and more.
body:
A datapack focused on integrating Cobblemon into the progression of Create, including rebalanced Poké Balls, craftable Exp Candies, and more.

![Rebalanced Poké Balls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FlBGHs9w/images/9f6dd1d4344f4194227e22e888535983965d0aca.png)


![Craftable Exp. Candies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FlBGHs9w/images/a78a112a2ec02d0fac6200a9b3f0b7fd4b7c79d9.png)

![New Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FlBGHs9w/images/6282ef9440420a132b9c7cbe6c08ffc4c39957b5.png)
